name: Fundo de Investimento em Direitos Creditorios BB Votorantim Highland Infraestrutura
summary: Fundo de Investimento em Direitos Creditorios BB Votorantim Highland Infraestrutura is a Brazilian investment fund focused on infrastructure-related receivables (FIDCs). It invests in credit rights linked to infrastructure projects, aiming to provide returns through fixed-income investments.
